hooks.command:
bash -lc 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); payload=$(cat); prompt=$(printf "%s" "$payload" | jq -r ".prompt // empty"); model=$(printf "%s" "$payload" | jq -r ".model // "unknown""); effort=$(awk -F" '''/^[[:space:]]*model_reasoning_effort[[:space:]]*=/{print $2; exit}''' "$root/.codex/config.toml" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$effort" ] || effort=$(awk -F" '''/^[[:space:]]*model_reasoning_effort[[:space:]]*=/{print $2; exit}''' "$HOME/.codex/config.toml" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$effort" ] || effort=unknown; [ -n "$prompt" ] || exit 0; printf "## %s [%s %s]
%s

" "$(date -Is)" "$model" "$effort" "$prompt" >> "$root/_prompt.md"'
